problem id: 14742dd8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01010110 -> 10101101
  11111000 -> 11110011
  10111110 -> 01111110
  11000000 -> 10000011
  01111011 -> 11110111
  11100111 -> 11001101
  00101110 -> 01011100
  01010001 -> 10100011
  10110011 -> 01100100

query: 10111011
predicted answer: 01110100
